content.query:
SELECT DISTINCT

lv.PersonID
,'Leaver' as EventType
,ReasonForLeaving as Reason
,LeaveDate as EventDate
,LeaveYear as EventYear
,LeaveMonth as EventMonth
,LeaveFY as EventFY
,LeaveMonthNumber as MonthNumber
,emp.EmployeeGroupID
,emp.CompanyCode

FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_leavers lv

LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee emp
on emp.PersonID = lv.PersonID

WHERE
lv.PersonID in (Select EmployeeID from [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] WHERE IsActive = 'Y')

UNION

SELECT DISTINCT

jnr.PersonID
,'Joiner' as EventType
,'Joiner' as Reason
,EmployeeStartDate as EventDate
,StartYear as EventYear
,StartMonth as EventMonth
,StartFY as EventFY
,StartMonthNumber as MonthNumber
,emp.EmployeeGroupID
,emp.CompanyCode

FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners_detail jnr

LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_employee emp
on emp.PersonID = jnr.PersonID

WHERE
jnr.PersonID in (Select EmployeeID from [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] WHERE IsActive = 'Y')
